leads.name: Jaipur Ethnic House
leads.priorityReason: The buyer shared an exact requirement of 180 kurta sets, asked for GST pricing and needs dispatch within ten days for Teej sales.
leads.next: Call before 1 PM to confirm sizes, then send a quantity-based quotation.
leads.whatsappMessage: Hi Jaipur Ethnic House, thank you for sharing your requirement for 180 festive kurta sets. We are checking size-wise availability and can send GST-inclusive bulk pricing today. May I call you before 1 PM to confirm the assortment?

leads.name: Metro School Supplies
leads.priorityReason: This is a large 650-piece requirement with school approval expected this week; the promised callback is already overdue.
leads.next: Call the purchase manager now and verify logo embroidery and delivery schedule.

leads.name: Navrang Fashion Point
leads.priorityReason: The retailer saved the catalogue but has not shared quantity, size mix or a buying timeline.
leads.next: Send the MOQ, colour chart and ask for expected quantity.

leads.name: Shree Balaji Garments
leads.priorityReason: The owner confirmed 320 pieces across four colours and will compare two supplier quotations this evening.
leads.next: Send the formal quotation with the 300-piece slab discount before 3 PM.

leads.name: Ludhiana Denim Depot
leads.priorityReason: A repeat-market buyer requested revised rates for 240 jeans, but the committed follow-up is two days overdue.
leads.next: Call today and offer the revised rate against a 50% advance.

leads.name: Urban Kids Wear
leads.priorityReason: The buyer responded to an ad and requested samples, but has not confirmed store details or order quantity.
leads.next: Verify the business address and share sample charges plus MOQ.

leads.name: Royal Menswear
leads.priorityReason: The buyer opened the ₹2.40 lakh quotation three times, confirmed the assortment and asked whether dispatch can start this week.
leads.next: Call before 12:30 PM to reserve stock and secure the advance payment.
leads.whatsappMessage: Hi Royal Menswear, we have kept the quoted formal-wear assortment available for you. If you confirm the advance today, we can begin dispatch this week. May I call to finalise the schedule?

leads.name: Surat Style Bazaar
leads.priorityReason: The quotation covers 200 pieces and the buyer asked for one final colour substitution; yesterday’s response deadline has passed.
leads.next: Send the updated colour availability and request quotation approval today.

leads.name: Classic Casuals
leads.priorityReason: The quotation is overdue for follow-up, but the buyer has not opened it since the first view.
leads.next: Send one concise reminder and confirm whether the requirement is still active.

leads.name: Bharat Uniform Corporation
leads.priorityReason: The ₹3.15 lakh order is approved on product and quantity; only 45-day credit terms remain before the buyer issues a purchase order.
leads.next: Get finance approval for 30-day credit and propose the compromise by 4 PM.

leads.name: Kanpur Cloth Mart
leads.priorityReason: The buyer accepted product samples and quantity but is seeking a 3% price reduction; the decision call is overdue.
leads.next: Call the proprietor and offer 2% against immediate 40% advance.

leads.name: Riddhi Siddhi Apparels
leads.priorityReason: The retailer shortlisted 150 sets and is negotiating mixed sizes, with a purchase decision expected tomorrow.
leads.next: Prepare a revised size mix and confirm freight-inclusive pricing tomorrow morning.

leads.name: Modern Retailers
leads.priorityReason: The buyer paid a 40% advance after stock and delivery were confirmed.

leads.name: Sai Collection Nagpur
leads.priorityReason: The purchase order was received and payment terms were accepted.

leads.name: Punjab Workwears
leads.priorityReason: The customer approved samples and placed a 500-set order with advance payment.

leads.name: Om Fashion Gallery
leads.priorityReason: The prospect chose a local supplier offering a lower MOQ and same-day stock pickup.

leads.name: Eastern Apparel Store
leads.priorityReason: The buyer stopped responding after three follow-ups and the seasonal buying window closed.

leads.name: Deccan Value Mart
leads.priorityReason: Required delivery was earlier than available production capacity, so the buyer placed the order elsewhere.
